listing.title: Handthrown Stoneware Mug 12 oz Satin Matte Amber Cone 6
listing.tags: handmade mug, stoneware mug, satin matte, wheel thrown, functional pottery, amber glaze
listing.dimensions: height 4 in, diameter 3.5 in, volume 12 oz
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware mug fired to cone 6 in an electric kiln. Satin matte amber glaze. Holds 12 oz. Dishwasher and microwave safe. Each mug is a unique piece from the wheel. Charleston, West Virginia studio.

listing.title: Handthrown Stoneware Mug 12 oz Iron Brown Satin Cone 6
listing.tags: handmade mug, stoneware mug, iron brown, wheel thrown, functional pottery
listing.dimensions: height 4 in, diameter 3.5 in, volume 12 oz
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware mug fired to cone 6 in an electric kiln. Iron brown satin glaze with subtle texture. Holds 12 oz. Dishwasher and microwave safe.

listing.title: Stoneware Cereal Bowl 24 oz Celadon Grey Gloss
listing.tags: stoneware bowl, celadon glaze, wheel thrown, cereal bowl, handmade pottery
listing.dimensions: height 3.5 in, diameter 6 in, volume 24 oz
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware cereal bowl in pale celadon grey gloss glaze. Generous 24 oz volume. Dishwasher and microwave safe.

listing.title: Handthrown Bud Vase Small Sage Green Matte Cone 6
listing.tags: bud vase, sage green, matte glaze, handmade pottery, small vase, wheel thrown
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware bud vase in muted sage green matte glaze. Holds single stems or small arrangements. Each piece is unique.

listing.title: Stoneware Dinner Plate 10 in Linen Satin Cone 6 Made to Order
listing.tags: dinner plate, linen glaze, made to order, handmade pottery, stoneware, wheel thrown
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware dinner plate in warm linen satin glaze. Made to order, allow 4 to 6 weeks. Listing for single plate. Set pricing available on request.

listing.title: Stoneware Soup Mug 16 oz White Cloud Matte with Handle
listing.tags: soup mug, white matte, stoneware, wheel thrown, handmade pottery, large mug
listing.dimensions: height 4.5 in, diameter 4 in, volume 16 oz
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware soup mug with pulled handle. White cloud matte glaze. 16 oz. Dishwasher and microwave safe.

listing.title: Handthrown Stoneware Oil Bottle 8 oz Rust Red Matte
listing.materials: Stoneware clay, cone 6 glaze, cork stopper
listing.tags: oil bottle, rust glaze, handmade pottery, stoneware, kitchen pottery
listing.dimensions: height 7 in, diameter 2.5 in, capacity 8 oz
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware olive oil bottle in deep rust red matte glaze. Cork stopper included. Practical and beautiful on the countertop.

listing.title: Set of 4 Stoneware Mugs 12 oz Warm Stone Matte Made to Order
listing.tags: mug set, stoneware set, handmade pottery, made to order, gift set, warm stone
listing.dimensions: each mug height 4 in, diameter 3.5 in, volume 12 oz
listing.description: Set of 4 wheel-thrown stoneware mugs in warm stone matte glaze. Made to order, allow 6 to 8 weeks. Each set is cohesive but not identical. Gift box available on request.

listing.title: Small Stoneware Planter 4 in Charcoal Matte with Drainage
listing.tags: stoneware planter, charcoal matte, handmade pottery, succulent pot, plant pot
listing.dimensions: height 4 in, outer diameter 4.5 in, drainage hole
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware planter in charcoal matte glaze with drainage hole. Fits most 3.5 in nursery pots. No saucer included - saucer available as add-on.

listing.title: Stoneware Tumbler 8 oz Deep Teal Gloss Cone 6
listing.tags: stoneware tumbler, teal glaze, handmade pottery, small mug, wheel thrown
listing.dimensions: height 3.75 in, diameter 3.25 in, volume 8 oz
listing.description: Wheel-thrown stoneware tumbler in deep teal gloss glaze. No handle. 8 oz. Dishwasher safe.
